overall.description: First-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring pedestrians with glowing neon umbrellas, massive digital billboards, and a hazy toxic atmosphere. The footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showcases ray-traced wet reflections and dense futuristic urban architecture as the camera moves from under an overpass through narrow streets into an open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass approaching crosswalk

events.description: moving from under the concrete overpass toward the open street crossing
crossing the wet street at the crosswalk alongside pedestrians with glowing umbrellas

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass and crossing the rain-soaked street while navigating through pedestrians carrying neon-lit umbrellas

notable_agents.action: futuristic police vehicle with blue neon underglow parked at the curb

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating a covered walkway with structural pillars
large illuminated corporate signage for DELAMAIN on the building facade
black police car with blue neon accents and LICE markings
tall modern street lamp casting bright white light through the rain

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete highway overpass in a rain-soaked cyberpunk city. The camera moves forward through the sheltered walkway, passing a parked police vehicle with blue neon lights, then steps onto a crosswalk marked with yellow stripes. Pedestrians with glowing neon umbrellas in pink, green, and blue colors walk alongside as the scene transitions from the covered area toward the open street.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban sidewalk between street and building with massive LED screens

events.description: passing the bright white LED billboard wall creating intense local illumination and reflections
passing under the large overhead NIGHT CITY sign structure spanning the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a building covered in massive digital displays, passing yellow construction barriers

entered.detail: building facade covered in massive bright white and cyan LED digital advertisements creating intense glow
yellow and gray construction barriers lining the edge of the sidewalk
large overhead gantry sign with NIGHT CITY text spanning the street
vertical digital billboard displaying the sudo corporate logo
tall palm trees lining the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: Moving along a narrow urban canyon, the camera walks past a building entirely covered in blindingly bright LED screens displaying advertisements. Yellow safety barriers line the left side of the walkway. The DELAMAIN sign recedes into the distance as the camera passes under a large NIGHT CITY overhead sign, with palm trees becoming visible along the street edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitioning street widening toward open plaza with holographic structures

events.description: street opens up revealing the large circular holographic billboard structure ahead in the plaza

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street as the environment opens up, approaching the large circular structure in the distance

notable_agents.action: person carrying a bright cyan glowing umbrella walking alongside the camera

entered.detail: massive cylindrical structure with rotating holographic advertisements floating above the street level
tall digital advertising pillars with colorful neon displays

segments.scene_description: The street gradually widens as the camera approaches an open plaza. The massive circular holographic billboard structure dominates the view ahead, displaying rotating advertisements. Palm trees continue to line the left side while the LED screen wall falls behind. The environment transitions from the narrow urban canyon to a more open public space with vertical advertising kiosks appearing on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with holographic advertising structures and reflective wet pavement

events.description: turning slightly left to move around the plaza area near the circular structure

agents.ego_description: moving through the open plaza, navigating around pedestrians and observing the circular holographic structure and surrounding advertisements

notable_agents.action: group of people sitting on benches under the circular holographic structure

entered.detail: benches with people sitting beneath the large circular holographic display
highly reflective wet plaza tiles mirroring the neon lights and holographic displays

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a spacious open plaza with highly reflective wet pavement that mirrors the surrounding neon lights. The circular holographic billboard structure now looms on the left side, with people sitting on benches beneath it. Vertical advertising kiosks display colorful digital content on the right. The environment feels more open and public compared to the narrow streets, with scattered pedestrians moving through the rain-soaked square.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered shadows of a concrete overpass into a vast, neon-drenched open plaza. It begins by moving through a rain-soaked walkway past a blue-lit police vehicle and pedestrians with glowing umbrellas, transitioning from the covered shelter onto a yellow-striped crosswalk. As the camera enters a narrow urban canyon, the environment shifts toward blindingly bright LED advertisement walls and yellow safety barriers, passing under a Night City sign as palm trees emerge along the street edge. The scene then expands as the narrow corridor opens up, with the LED walls receding to reveal a massive circular holographic billboard dominating the horizon. Finally, the camera enters a spacious public square where highly reflective wet pavement mirrors the surrounding neon lights and vertical advertising kiosks line the path.
